source_meta.source_document: NexGen Complete Knee Solution LPS Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Primary total knee arthroplasty platform within the NexGen Complete Knee Solution family.

trays.tray_notes: The official surgical technique describes the MICRO-MILL system and saw blade instrumentation workflows for femoral and tibial preparation.

components.component_notes: Official NexGen materials describe the femoral component family within the complete knee solution.
Official technique materials describe tibial plate preparation and implantation.
Official technique materials reference articular surface insertion during component implantation.
Official technique materials describe patellar preparation and implant thickness planning.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public surgical technique supports the component families but does not provide a compact public SKU list in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for product-code expansion.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction keeps the implant-family level only.
